name: nova
description: A compounding-agent nervous system for Claude Code, for both you and your coding agent — five loops in one plugin: rules + learning (/claude-md, /learn), continuity (/handoff + branch-aware hooks), completion-honesty gate (/gate, an independent claim→evidence verifier), and session worklog (/worklog, optional self-contained Nova-branded HTML). Honest, git-native, low context-tax; all hooks are opt-in per project (docs/handoff/ for handoff, .nova/gate.on for the gate nudge).
